notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez hit by pitch. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Colt Keith. Masataka Yoshida scores. Ceddanne Rafaela scores. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Colt Keith. Masataka Yoshida scores. Ceddanne Rafaela scores. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez grounds into a double play, pitcher Kyle Finnegan to second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Marcelo Mayer out at 2nd. Carlos Narváez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez grounds into a double play, pitcher Kyle Finnegan to second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Marcelo Mayer out at 2nd. Carlos Narváez out at 1st.
